claims.claim: The integration materializes wake-gate queue payloads—`/prepare-project` and `/dispatch` requests—from cached local model artifacts and validates the copied harness against a live llama.cpp backend serving a quantized Phi-4-mini-instruct model.
claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: In the tested setting, the contract harness reported successful probes on both the `/models` and `/chat/completions` endpoints (HTTP 200, `ok=true`), and the llama.cpp service was cleanly shut down afterward.
claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: These results are bounded to a single machine, a single model, and a single validation session; no latency or throughput benchmarks were collected, and no external replication has been performed.
